sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113143" key="xalko/muia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκό-μυια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113143.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a fly of bright metallic hue,</tr_> ingredient of an eye-salve, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:100" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.100</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
